name: Deep Root Injection
talk: Shrubs are transitioning from slow growth to bloom. Deep root injection delivers nutrition, fungus prevention, and insect control directly to the root zone — more effective than surface spraying for the first round.

name: Foliar Spray
talk: Shrubs actively growing and blooming. Foliar spray covers nutrition, disease prevention, and insect control. Max Minors provides trace micronutrients.

name: Foliar Spray
talk: Mid-season maintenance. Continued protection during peak growing and blooming. Same formulation as SC2.

name: Foliar Spray
talk: Late-season spray. Switched from Altus back to Triple Crown for insect rotation, and added calcium supplement for cell wall strength heading into fall.

name: Foliar Spray
talk: Final round. Horticultural oil smothers overwintering insects and eggs. Disease prevention continues. Sets up clean start for spring.
